description: The dialect accepted by pawn-lang/compiler-based toolchains bundled with SA-MP 0.3.7 server releases: Pawn 3.2.3664 lineage plus community bug fixes and additions.

compiler.notes: Community-maintained fork with bug fixes and new features over the original compiler; see pawn-lang/compiler readme for #pragma compat guidance when migrating from the original compiler.

references.note: Primary source for pawn-lang/compiler behavior claims.
